name: hardware store
hints: The hardware store is loaded with essential tools. Take everything you can carry.
GET PICK, GET HYDROMETER, GET PUMP, and GET CABLES. All four items are needed at different points.
Climber's pick: for digging and extracting quartz. Hydrometer: for testing battery acid. Pump: for extracting gasoline. Jumper cables: for charging batteries. EAST exits to Main & Mountain View.
You'll need multiple trips since max carry is 5. Prioritize the climber's pick (for quartz and digging) and pump (for gasoline) first.
notes: Hardware store with four critical items: Climber's Pick (extract quartz, dig in field), Hydrometer (test battery), Manual hand pump (extract gasoline from underground tank), Jumper Cables (charge battery). EAST exits to Main & Mountain View (room 4). With max carry of 5, plan multiple trips.
